description.text: Take cover whilst working over the high ground or duck down and attack from below. One Base.

de.original: Take cover whilst working over the high ground or duck down and attack from below. One Base.
de.translation: Geht in Deckung, während ihr durch hohe Gebiete prescht, oder greift von unten an. Eine Basis.

es.original: Take cover whilst working over the high ground or duck down and attack from below. One Base.
es.translation:
Ataca desde lo alto o desde abajo sin dejar de cubrirte.
Un núcleo.

pt.original: Take cover whilst working over the high ground or duck down and attack from below. One Base.
pt.translation: Proteja-se lá em cima ou agache-se e ataque lá de baixo. Uma Base.

fr.original: Take cover whilst working over the high ground or duck down and attack from below. One Base.
fr.translation: Escaladez les hauteurs pour vous couvrir ou rampez pour attaquer par-dessous. Une base.

ru.original: Take cover whilst working over the high ground or duck down and attack from below. One Base.
ru.translation: Найди укрытие и атакуй с возвышенности, или пригнись и бей снизу. Одна база.
